items.title: Nigeria troops rescue 31 Easter worshippers after deadly church attack
items.summary: Nigeria’s military said Sunday it rescued 31 worshippers abducted during Easter services in northwestern Kaduna state, after troops engaged gunmen in a firefight, though at least five people were killed in the attack. The assault on a Catholic and an evangelical church underscores worsening insecurity in the region, where criminal gangs and militant groups have intensified raids and kidnappings.

items.title: "Il y a beaucoup de maladies qui viennent des animaux ou de la détérioration de l'environnement"
items.summary: En France le « One Health Summit » s'est ouvert ce dimanche à Lyon. Il réunit dirigeants et scientifiques du monde entier autour d'un objectif commun, la santé mondiale, et pas seulement celle des personnes, celle aussi des animaux, des végétaux et des écosystèmes. On en parle avec le professeur Pierre Tattevin, Chef du service des maladies infectieuses du CHU de Rennes.

translation.title: "There are many diseases that come from animals or from environmental deterioration"
translation.summary: In France the "One Health Summit" opened this Sunday in Lyon. It brings together world leaders and scientists around a common goal, global health, and not just that of people, animals, plants and ecosystems. This is discussed with Professor Pierre Tattevin, Head of the Department of Infectious Diseases at CHU Rennes.

items.title: Niger : la violence djihadiste se propage dans la région de Tahoua
items.summary: Nouvelle attaque dans la région de Tahoua au Niger, une zone longtemps épargnée mais qui subit désormais les foudres de la violence djihadiste. Corruption grave au Kenya, où le secrétaire d'Etat au pétrole ainsi que les plusieurs hauts responsables d'agences gouvernementales ont été limogés. En cause: du trafic dans l'importation d'hydrocarbures. Et enfin, direction un maquis baoulé Côte d'Ivoire pour célébrer "Paquinou" en ce dimanche de Pâques.

translation.title: Niger: Jihadist violence spreads in the Tahoua region
translation.summary: New attack in the Tahoua region of Niger, an area that has been spared for a long time but has now suffered the lightnings of jihadist violence. Serious corruption in Kenya, where the Secretary of State for Oil and several senior officials of government agencies were dismissed. In question: traffic in oil imports. And finally, head for a Baoulé Ivory Coast maquis to celebrate "Paquinou" on this Easter Sunday.

items.title: Édition spéciale : le bilan de Patrice Talon à une semaine de la présidentielle béninoise
items.summary: A une semaine de la présidentielle au Bénin, focus sur le bilan de Patrice Talon après une décennie au pouvoir. Au menu : croissance économique saluée, modernisation visible … mais aussi critiques persistantes sur l’état de la démocratie, l’opposition marginalisée et les libertés. Pour décortiquer ces 10 ans, deux invités : Wilfried Léandre Houngbédji, le porte-parole du gouvernement, et Francis Kpatindé, journaliste et observateur averti de la vie politique béninoise.

translation.title: Special edition: Patrice Talon's one-week review of the Beninese presidential elections
translation.summary: A week before the presidential elections in Benin, focus on Patrice Talon's performance after a decade in power. On the menu: welcomed economic growth, visible modernization ... but also persistent criticism of the state of democracy, marginalised opposition and freedoms. To decorate these 10 years, two guests: Wilfried Léandre Houngbedji, the government spokesman, and Francis Kpatindé, journalist and expert observer of Benin's political life.

items.title: Père Gabriel Romanelli: "la paix à Gaza aiderait à pacifier toute la région"

Malgré les frappes israéliennes qui se poursuivent, et les conditions de vie dans l'enclave qu'il qualifie de "dantesques", il poursuit sa mission sur place, pour venir en aide à la population. Il signe un livre très émouvant qui vient de paraître, co-écrit avec Guillaume de Dieuleveult, "Les ruines et la lumière" (éditions du Rocher)

translation.title: Father Gabriel Romanelli: "peace in Gaza would help to pacify the whole region"
translation.summary: On this Easter Sunday, an interview with Father Gabriel Romanelli, pastor of the Catholic parish of the Holy Family of Gaza, the only parish of the enclave. Despite the continuing Israeli strikes, and the living conditions in the enclave he described as "dantesques", he continued his mission on the spot to help the population. He signed a very moving book that has just appeared, co-written with Guillaume de Dieileleveult, "The ruins and the light" (editions of the Rock)

items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy conservation law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher-quality and better-quality energy efficiency efforts, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to gain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection was carried out through a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which were to be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi and Sichuan, as well as by the Standing Committee of the People ' s Congress of Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a universal nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot checks and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving work in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving activities; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with legislation; other issues in law enforcement; and suggestions and recommendations for amendments to energy-saving laws.
